title: Gus Eghneim
compiled_truth: Gus Eghneim is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-05 to 2001-11-30), Gus Eghneim sent 14 and received 109 emails, totalling 123 interactions. Top correspondents: [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (13), [Don Miller](people/don-miller) (10), [Dave Kellermeyer](people/dave-kellermeyer) (9), [Ross Newlin](people/ross-newlin) (9), [Mitch Robinson](people/mitch-robinson) (5).
